achievements.title: Pinball Bomb
achievements.description: Collect the Power Bomb to begin the Thardus fight. Keep one for other levels!

achievements.title: Permafrost Pummeler
achievements.description: In Multi-Mission Normal Mode, defeat Thardus to get the Artifact.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Pinball Missile
achievements.description: Collect the Missile to begin the Omega Pirate fight. Useful for Shriekbats and Beetles!

achievements.title: Pirated Phason
achievements.description: In Multi-Mission Normal Mode, defeat Omega Pirate to get the Artifact.

achievements.title: Logbook Bounty I
achievements.description: In any Mode, defeat at least 1 of every creature found at Pirate Frigate in one ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Logbook Bounty II
achievements.description: In any Mode, defeat at least 1 of every creature found at Tallon Overworld in one ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Logbook Bounty III
achievements.description: In Multi-Mission, defeat both Thardus and Omega Pirate without losing a ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Logbook Bounty IV
achievements.description: In Multi-Mission, defeat both forms of Metroid Prime without losing a ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Logbook Bounty V
achievements.description: In Multi-Mission, defeat 1 of every creature in the game without losing a ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.description: In Multi-Mission, obtain a score of 2,000,000 or more to spawn Extra Ball.

achievements.title: The Lady's Ball
achievements.description: In Multi-Mission, obtain a score of 5,000,000 or more to spawn Extra Ball.

achievements.description: In Multi-Mission, obtain up to 9 balls in reserve.

achievements.title: Artifacts Are Nothing Special
achievements.description: In Multi-Mission, get 12 Specials or more.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Magmoor First Place!!
achievements.description: Complete Magmoor Cavern in Wireless Mission by getting 100,000 points or more.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Magmoor Escape!
achievements.description: Get 100,000 points or more in Magmoor Cavern within 2 minutes.

achievements.title: Magmoor Varia Barrier
achievements.description: Complete Magmoor Cavern without losing points(must be at Zero Points to restart).

achievements.title: Samus Simply Walks Through Magmoor
achievements.description: While in Magmoor Caverns, get 3 Specials before hitting 100,000 points.
